mandates.mandate: All Trello operations go through MCP tools. No direct API calls.
Check integrations.trello.enabled in global.yaml before any Trello operation. Skip silently if disabled.
Hook failures are non-blocking. Log a warning and continue the workflow.
Every card must contain a symphony-id comment in its description for bidirectional mapping.

push-sync.description: Symphony → Trello. Triggered by artifact-enrichment-hook after status-sync.

step.title: Check prerequisites
step.action: Read integrations.trello.enabled from global.yaml. If false: return (no-op).
Read integrations.trello.board_id. If empty: log warning "Trello board_id not configured. Run /symphony-trello-setup." Return.

step.title: Determine event type
step.action: Read the changed artifact. Determine if this is: new story, status change, content update, or archive.

step.title: Map and dispatch
step.action: Read mapper.yaml for field mapping.
Read integrations.trello.columns from global.yaml for column name mapping.

branch.action: Read the story file. Extract: id, title, status, acceptance_criteria, traces_to.
Call MCP tool: createCard with name=title, desc=rendered_description, idList=column_for_status.
If acceptance_criteria exist: call MCP tool: createChecklistOnCard with name="Acceptance Criteria" and items from criteria.
If traces_to exists: call MCP tool: addLabelToCard with label matching the epic/requirement ID.
Find card on board: call MCP tool: getBoardCards. Match by symphony-id in description.
Look up target column from mapper.yaml status_to_column mapping.
Call MCP tool: moveCard with card id and target list id.
Find card on board by symphony-id.
Re-render description from template. Call MCP tool: updateCard.
Find card on board by symphony-id.

step.title: Handle errors
step.action: If any MCP call fails: log warning with error details. Do NOT halt the workflow.
Log to _symphony/_memory/conductor-sidecar/ for Hub dashboard display.

step.title: Read board state
step.action: Read integrations.trello.board_id from global.yaml.
Call MCP tool: getBoardCards for the board. Get all cards with their list positions.
Call MCP tool: getListCards for each configured column to get list IDs.

step.title: Match cards to stories
step.action: For each card: extract symphony-id from description (pattern: <!-- symphony-id: {id} -->).
Cards without symphony-id: skip (not managed by Symphony).
For each matched card: look up story file at docs/implementation-artifacts/stories/{story_id}.md.

step.title: Compare and sync
step.action: For each matched card-story pair:
Map card's current list to a Symphony status via mapper.yaml (reverse lookup).
Compare mapped status to story file's current status.
If they match: no action needed.
If they differ: update story file's status to match Trello (Trello wins).
Run status-sync protocol to propagate the change.
Log the sync action.

step.title: Report results
step.action: Print summary: X stories synced, Y conflicts resolved (Trello won), Z cards skipped (no symphony-id).

step.title: Check MCP server
step.action: Check if .mcp.json exists at project root. If not: create it from template.
Check if TRELLO_API_KEY and TRELLO_TOKEN environment variables are set.
If not set: instruct user to get API key from https://trello.com/app-key and generate a token.

step.title: Configure board
step.action: Call MCP tool: listBoards (or getUserBoards) to show available boards.
Ask user to pick a board. Write board_id to global.yaml → integrations.trello.board_id.

step.title: Map columns
step.action: Call MCP tool: getLists for the selected board.
Show the lists. Ask user to map: which list is Backlog? In Progress? In Review? Done?
Write column names to global.yaml → integrations.trello.columns.

step.title: Enable integration
step.action: Set integrations.trello.enabled: true in global.yaml.
Print: "Trello integration configured. Board: {name}. Run /symphony-trello-sync for initial sync."
